responsibilities: Conduct original research to advance the state of the art in machine learning and deep learning methods
Design and run controlled experiments to test novel hypotheses about model architectures and training techniques
Author and publish research papers at top-tier venues such as NeurIPS, ICML, and ICLR
Develop theoretical frameworks and mathematical proofs to explain and predict model behavior
Collaborate with engineering teams to transition promising research prototypes into scalable production systems
Review and critique peer research papers, providing technical feedback as part of conference program committees
Build and maintain experimental codebases and benchmarks to evaluate new algorithms against established baselines
Present research findings to internal stakeholders and external audiences through talks and technical reports
Mentor junior researchers and PhD interns on experimental methodology and research best practices
Identify emerging research directions aligned with organizational priorities and long-term AI capabilities
